text: Stock market plummets, investors left in turmoil.
Groundbreaking discovery: new black hole found on the edge of the galaxy.
Legendary baseball player retires after a glittering career.
Massive wildfire threatens ancient forest, authorities struggle to contain it.
Tech giant accused of selling user data without consent, sparking outrage among consumers.
Renewable energy breakthrough brings hope to combating climate change.
Asteroid narrowly misses Earth, close call leaves scientists on edge.
Soccer team achieves historic comeback to clinch championship title.
Negotiations between world powers reach impasse, tension escalates.
Financial scam exposes loopholes in system, public trust shaken.
